mapper.sql: A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.PIP_PREFIX, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , A.NCNT_TOTAL, A.NCNT_NOT_ASSIGN, A.NCNT_RERS_ASSIGN, A.NCNT_ASSIGN, A.NCNT_SERV_ASSIGN, A.NCNT_RERS_ALLOC, A.NCNT_ALLOC

A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.PIP_PREFIX, B.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, C.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM , A.NCNT NCNT_TOTAL, SUM(A.NCNT_NOT_ASSIGN) NCNT_NOT_ASSIGN, SUM(A.NCNT_RERS_ASSIGN) NCNT_RERS_ASSIGN, SUM(A.NCNT_ASSIGN) NCNT_ASSIGN , SUM(A.NCNT_SERV_ASSIGN) NCNT_SERV_ASSIGN, SUM(A.NCNT_RERS_ALLOC) NCNT_RERS_ALLOC, SUM(A.NCNT_ALLOC) NCNT_ALLOC
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ( SELECT , ROWNUM RNUM FROM ( SELECT FROM ( SELECT A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.PIP_PREFIX, A.NCNT, B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0001' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_NOT_ASSIGN , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0002' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_RERS_ASSIGN , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0003' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_ASSIGN , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0004' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_SERV_ASSIGN , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0005' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_RERS_ALLOC , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0006' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_ALLOC FROM MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST A, MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST B
AND A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ = B.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ(+) ) A, MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD B, MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD C WHERE 1=1 AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = B.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD AND A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = C.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD GROUP BY A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.PIP_PREFIX, A.NCNT, B.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, C.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM ORDER BY A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, B.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, C.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, A.PIP_PREFIX ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{lastIndex} ) A WHERE A.RNUM >= #{firstIndex}

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM ( SELECT FROM ( SELECT A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.PIP_PREFIX, A.NCNT, B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0001' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_NOT_ASSIGN , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0002' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_RERS_ASSIGN , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0003' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_ASSIGN , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0004' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_SERV_ASSIGN , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0005' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_RERS_ALLOC , CASE WHEN B.SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD = 'IA0006' THEN B.NCNT ELSE 0 END NCNT_ALLOC FROM MST.TB_IP_BLOCK_MST A, MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST B
AND A.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ = B.NIP_BLOCK_MST_SEQ(+) ) A, MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD B, MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD C WHERE 1=1 AND A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = B.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD AND A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = C.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD GROUP BY A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.PIP_PREFIX, A.NCNT, B.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, C.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM ORDER BY A.SIP_CREATE_SEQ_CD, B.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, C.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, A.PIP_PREFIX )
mapper.sql: A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, A.SSVC_GROUP_NM, A.SSVC_OBJ_CD, A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, A.NCNT_TOTAL, A.NALLOC_CNT, A.NASSIGN_NCNT_24, A.NASSIGN_NCNT_25 , A.NASSIGN_NCNT_26, A.NASSIGN_NCNT_27, A.NASSIGN_NCNT_28, A.NASSIGN_NCNT_29, A.NASSIGN_NCNT_SUM, A.NASSIGN_PERCENT

MM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, SSVC_GROUP_CD, LB.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM, SSVC_OBJ_CD, LO.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM , MM.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, CT.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT) AS NCNT_TOTAL, SUM(NALLOC_CNT) AS NALLOC_CNT , SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_24) AS NASSIGN_NCNT_24, SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_25) AS NASSIGN_NCNT_25, SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_26) AS NASSIGN_NCNT_26 , SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_27) AS NASSIGN_NCNT_27, SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_28) AS NASSIGN_NCNT_28, SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_29) AS NASSIGN_NCNT_29 , SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_24) + SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_25) + SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_26) + SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_27) + SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_28) + SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT_29) AS NASSIGN_NCNT_SUM , ROUND(MST.UF_CONVERT_PERCENT((SUM(NALLOC_CNT) / SUM(NASSIGN_NCNT))),2) AS NASSIGN_PERCENT

M.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , SSVC_GROUP_CD, SSVC_OBJ_CD, SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , CASE WHEN SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' THEN NCNT WHEN SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END AS NASSIGN_NCNT , CASE WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0005','IA0006') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' THEN NCNT WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0005','IA0006') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END AS NALLOC_CNT , CASE WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND NBITMASK < 25 THEN NCNT WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' AND NBITMASK < 52 THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END AS NASSIGN_NCNT_24 , CASE WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND NBITMASK = 25 THEN NCNT WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' AND NBITMASK >= 52 AND NBITMASK < 56 THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END AS NASSIGN_NCNT_25 , CASE WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND NBITMASK = 26 THEN NCNT WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' AND NBITMASK >= 56 AND NBITMASK < 60 THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END AS NASSIGN_NCNT_26 , CASE WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND NBITMASK = 27 THEN NCNT WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' AND NBITMASK >= 60 AND NBITMASK < 64 THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END AS NASSIGN_NCNT_27 , CASE WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND NBITMASK = 28 THEN NCNT WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' AND NBITMASK = 64 THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END AS NASSIGN_NCNT_28 , CASE WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND NBITMASK > 28 THEN NCNT WHEN SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0001','IA0002','IA0003','IA0004') AND SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' AND NBITMASK > 64 THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END AS NASSIGN_NCNT_29
MM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, SSVC_GROUP_CD, LB.SLVL_NM, SSVC_OBJ_CD, LO.SLVL_NM, MM.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, CT.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM

A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, A.SSVC_GROUP_NM, A.SSVC_OBJ_CD, A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.NCNT_TOTAL, A.NCNT_NOT_ASSIGN, A.NCNT_RERS_ASSIGN, A.NCNT_ASSIGN, A.NCNT_SERV_ASSIGN, A.NCNT_RERS_ALLOC, A.NCNT_ALLOC, A.NCNT_PERCENT , A.SUM_TYPE_CD

FM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , DECODE(SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, NULL, '총계', SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM) AS SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM , FM.SSVC_GROUP_CD , CASE WHEN SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM IS NULL AND SASSIGN_TYPE_NM IS NULL THEN '' WHEN FM.SSVC_GROUP_CD = 'BL9999' THEN '소계' ELSE LB.SLVL_NM END AS SSVC_GROUP_NM , FM.SSVC_OBJ_CD, LO.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM, FM.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, FM.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, FM.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , CASE WHEN SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM IS NULL AND SASSIGN_TYPE_NM IS NULL THEN '' WHEN FM.SSVC_GROUP_CD = 'BL9999' THEN '' WHEN SASSIGN_TYPE_NM IS NOT NULL AND FM.SSVC_GROUP_CD != 'BL9999' THEN SASSIGN_TYPE_NM ELSE '소계' END AS SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , NCNT_TOTAL, NCNT_NOT_ASSIGN, NCNT_RERS_ASSIGN, NCNT_ASSIGN, NCNT_SERV_ASSIGN, NCNT_RERS_ALLOC, NCNT_ALLOC, NCNT_PERCENT, SUM_TYPE_CD

, SUM(NCNT) NCNT_TOTAL , SUM(CASE SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD WHEN 'IA0001' THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END) NCNT_NOT_ASSIGN , SUM(CASE SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD WHEN 'IA0002' THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END) NCNT_RERS_ASSIGN , SUM(CASE SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD WHEN 'IA0003' THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END) NCNT_ASSIGN , SUM(CASE SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD WHEN 'IA0004' THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END) NCNT_SERV_ASSIGN , SUM(CASE SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD WHEN 'IA0005' THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END) NCNT_RERS_ALLOC , SUM(CASE SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD WHEN 'IA0006' THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END) NCNT_ALLOC , ROUND(MST.UF_CONVERT_PERCENT(SUM(CASE SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD WHEN 'IA0005' THEN NCLASS_CNT WHEN 'IA0006' THEN NCNT ELSE 0 END ) / SUM(NCNT)),1) NCNT_PERCENT
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ( SELECT FROM ( SELECT LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD , LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD , SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, 'TOT_LIST_ORGSVC' SUM_TYPE_CD
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST M LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST LV ON M.NLVL_MST_SEQ = LV.NLVL_MST_SEQ
GROUP BY LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD, LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD, LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD,SASSIGN_TYPE_CD
UNION SELECT LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD , LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD , SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , 'SA9999' SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, 'TOT_LIST_ORG' SUM_TYPE_CD
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST M LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST LV ON M.NLVL_MST_SEQ = LV.NLVL_MST_SEQ
GROUP BY LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD, LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD, LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD
UNION SELECT LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, 'BL9999' SSVC_GROUP_CD, '' SSVC_OBJ_CD , '' SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , '' SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , '' SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , 'TOT_LIST_LINE' SUM_TYPE_CD
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST M LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST LV ON M.NLVL_MST_SEQ = LV.NLVL_MST_SEQ
GROUP BY LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD
UNION SELECT 'CL9999' SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , '' AS SSVC_GROUP_CD, '' SSVC_OBJ_CD, '' SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, '' SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, '' SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, 'TOT_LIST_ALL' SUM_TYPE_CD
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST M LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST LV ON M.NLVL_MST_SEQ = LV.NLVL_MST_SEQ
) FM LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD LB ON FM.SSVC_GROUP_CD = LB.SLVL_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD LO ON FM.SSVC_OBJ_CD = LO.SLVL_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD SL ON FM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = SL.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD IV ON FM.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = IV.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD IT ON FM.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = IT.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD AT ON FM.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = AT.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD ORDER BY FM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, LB.SLVL_NM, LO.SLVL_NM, FM.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, FM.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, SASSIGN_TYPE_CD ) A

SELECT count(1) totalCount FROM ( SELECT FROM ( SELECT LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD , LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD , SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, 'TOT_LIST_ORGSVC' SUM_TYPE_CD
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST M LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST LV ON M.NLVL_MST_SEQ = LV.NLVL_MST_SEQ
GROUP BY LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD, LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD, LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, SASSIGN_TYPE_CD
UNION SELECT LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD , LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD , SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , 'SA9999' SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, 'TOT_LIST_ORG' SUM_TYPE_CD
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST M LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST LV ON M.NLVL_MST_SEQ = LV.NLVL_MST_SEQ
GROUP BY LV.SSVC_GROUP_CD, LV.SSVC_OBJ_CD, LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD
UNION SELECT LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, 'BL9999' SSVC_GROUP_CD, '' SSVC_OBJ_CD , '' SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD , '' SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , '' SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , 'TOT_LIST_LINE' SUM_TYPE_CD
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST M LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST LV ON M.NLVL_MST_SEQ = LV.NLVL_MST_SEQ
GROUP BY LV.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD
UNION SELECT 'CL9999' SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD , '' AS SSVC_GROUP_CD, '' SSVC_OBJ_CD, '' SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, '' SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, '' SASSIGN_TYPE_CD, 'TOT_LIST_ALL' SUM_TYPE_CD
FROM MST.TB_IP_ASSIGN_MST M LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_MST LV ON M.NLVL_MST_SEQ = LV.NLVL_MST_SEQ
) FM LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD LB ON FM.SSVC_GROUP_CD = LB.SLVL_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_LVL_CD LO ON FM.SSVC_OBJ_CD = LO.SLVL_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_SVC_LINE_TYPE_CD SL ON FM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD = SL.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_IP_VERSION_TYPE_CD IV ON FM.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = IV.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_IP_CREATE_TYPE_CD IT ON FM.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD = IT.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN MST.TB_ASSIGN_TYPE_CD AT ON FM.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD = AT.SASSIGN_TYPE_CD ORDER BY FM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, LB.SLVL_NM, LO.SLVL_NM, FM.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, FM.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, SASSIGN_TYPE_CD ) A
mapper.sql: A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, A.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, A.SSVC_GROUP_CD, A.SSVC_GROUP_NM , A.SSVC_OBJ_CD, A.SSVC_OBJ_NM , A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, A.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, A.SASSIGN_TYPE_NM , A.PIP_PREFIX, A.NALLOC_CNT, A.NUSE_FREE_CNT, A.NPERCENT, A.NSUBNET_CNT

MM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, ILL.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, IL.SSVC_GROUP_CD, IB.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_GROUP_NM, IL.SSVC_OBJ_CD, IO.SLVL_NM AS SSVC_OBJ_NM, MM.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, MM.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, PIP_PREFIX

SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, NLVL_MST_SEQ, SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD, SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, SASSIGN_TYPE_CD , CASE WHEN SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND NBITMASK <= 24 THEN PIP_PREFIX WHEN SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' AND NBITMASK <= 64 THEN PIP_PREFIX WHEN SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND NBITMASK > 24 THEN CIDR(INET(SIP_BLOCK || '/24')) WHEN SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' AND NBITMASK > 64 THEN CIDR(INET(SIP_BLOCK || '/64')) ELSE '0.0.0.0/0' END AS PIP_PREFIX , CASE WHEN SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0005', 'IA0006') THEN NCNT WHEN SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' AND SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0005', 'IA0006') THEN NCLASS_CNT ELSE 0 END AS NALLOC_CNT , CASE WHEN SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' AND SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0003', 'IA0004') THEN NCNT WHEN SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0002' AND SASSIGN_LEVEL_CD IN ('IA0003', 'IA0004') THEN NCLASS_CNT ELSE 0 END AS NUSE_FREE_CNT , CASE WHEN SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD = 'CV0001' THEN NCNT ELSE NCLASS_CNT END AS NIP_CNT , NIP_ASSIGN_MST_SEQ

MM.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_CD, ILL.SSVC_LINE_TYPE_NM, IL.SSVC_GROUP_CD, IB.SLVL_NM, IL.SSVC_OBJ_CD, IO.SLVL_NM, MM.SIP_CREATE_TYPE_CD , SIP_CREATE_TYPE_NM, MM.SIP_VERSION_TYPE_CD, SIP_VERSION_TYPE_NM, PIP_PREFIX
